div.head: 238. Editorial Note
div.p:
On June 3 the United States and Argentina signed a General Agreement for a Program of Technical Cooperation. The agreement was signed for the United States by Willard Beaulac and for Argentina by Alfonso de Laferrere and entered into force that same day.
For text, see 8 UST 811. Documentation on this subject is in Department of State, Central File 835.00–TA.
